description: Mappings between NF Research Tools observationType values and Mammalian Phenotype Ontology (MP) terms. MP terms apply to Animal Model observations only.

Tumor Growth/Burden.definition: greater than the expected number of tumors

Survival/Lifespan.definition: anomaly in the ability to live and develop

Body Weight/Growth.definition: reduced average weight of an organism

Behavioral.definition: the observable actions or reactions of an organism

Nervous System.definition: the observable morphological and physiological characteristics of the extensive, intricate network of electrochemical structures in the body

Cardiovascular System.definition: the observable morphological and physiological characteristics of the mammalian heart, blood vessels, or circulatory system

Immune Response.definition: the observable morphological and physiological characteristics of the cells and tissues involved in immune responses

Metabolic.definition: anomaly in the chemical reactions and physical changes involving the products of digestion

Developmental.definition: anomaly in the developmental orchestration of cell, tissue or organ development

Cellular/Molecular.definition: the observable morphological and physiological characteristics of a cell, the basic structural and functional unit of all organisms

Coat Color.definition: irregular or unusual pigmentation of the hair

notes: MP ontology IDs apply to Animal Model observations only
When extracting Animal Model observations, use the mp_id for observationTypeOntologyId
All other observationType values should leave observationTypeOntologyId empty
v2.0: consolidated 23 overlapping terms into per-resourceType vocabularies (issue #102)
